---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

## 📄 My Resume

You can preview my resume below.\
To download the full PDF, use the button underneath.

[**👉 Download Resume (PDF)**](files/Ishita_Khanna.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

<iframe src="files/Ishita_Khanna_2.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: 1px solid #ccc;">

</iframe>
